diagrams.title: Operating System as Intermediary
diagrams.description: Shows the layered architecture with user applications at top, operating system in middle, and hardware at bottom
elements: Arrows showing requests flowing up and services flowing down
diagrams.purpose: Understanding OS role as bridge between user and hardware

diagrams.title: Storage Hierarchy Pyramid
diagrams.description: Hierarchical organization of computer storage from fastest to slowest
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing trade-offs between speed, cost, and capacity in storage

diagrams.title: Interrupt Handling Flowchart
diagrams.description: Step-by-step process of how CPU handles an interrupt
diagrams.purpose: Understanding interrupt-driven architecture and event handling

diagrams.title: Dual Mode Operation
diagrams.description: Separation of user mode and kernel mode with transitions
diagrams.purpose: Understanding protection mechanisms and privilege levels
